title: Synapse screen intent
description: Declaration an agent completes BEFORE generating a screen (design.md §4 made machine-checkable). Validate with: python3 tools/validate.py page <file>. Component names must match synapse.manifest.json keys exactly.

locales.description: Both locales are mandatory — strings must be provided for each.

empty.description: Empty state specified for every list/table/search.

loading.description: Skeleton/spinner behavior specified per the feedback tree.

hidden_capabilities.description: Plan-gated features omitted from the screen (patterns.md §6).

disabled_with_reason.description: Org-obtainable capabilities rendered disabled + reason Tooltip.
